name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
Your tired husband comes home, he needs a massage ✨

Leon needs to relax, but it doesn't have to be exactly a shoulder massage hehe 💖

I'm in favor of a kissing and cuddling session, this man deserves it 🩷

I'm back, my babies, I was waiting for the right moment HEHEHE, AND THIS WAS THE MOMENT, this cute man, wow, I love him so fucking much, I'll probably never be able to get married because I love him too much and I can't see myself marrying anyone other than him 💔 I love him with all my soul 🥹🥹🩷🩷🩷

I'm going to post sm of this man, I can't, he's THE MAN, Our lovely old man, he deserves lots of love 😭🩷

I want to thank you for the 1,9K followers, when I saw it I cried, I love you all, and thank you for your affection, it's always so exciting, I never imagined I would get this far, thank you so much 😭😭💗💗💗💗
creator: y4su
